name: Crockpot Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 Onions, sweet, cut into quarters and slices
1 Tomatoes, Italian-style (canned, stewed tomatoes, undrained or plain)
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the vegetables and meat in the crockpot in that order.
2. Mix flour with seasonings and sprinkle over each meat layer.
3. Sprinkle Worcestershire sauce over everything, then pour stewed tomatoes over all.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 10-12 hours (or adjust if using a smaller pot).
5. For larger pots, use approximately 3-1/2 or 5 quarts of ingredients.
6. Prepare the recipe ahead of time, refrigerate overnight, then place in the crockpot in the morning.
7. The stew will produce a lot of gravy; thicken with cornstarch if desired.
8. Occasionally, cook large elbow macaroni separately (e.g., Mueller's Ready-cut) and mix it with leftover stew for added texture.
9. Add canned green beans during the last 4 hours of cooking, if preferred.
